name: Kraft Anyway Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Salad Dressing or Fat-Free Salad Dressing
2 1/2 cups Chopped Vegetables (Tomatoes, Carrots, Cucumbers, Broccoli,
1 cup Chopped Meat (Ham, Chicken, Salami, etc.), optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salad dressing, Parmesan cheese, salt, and milk in a bowl.
2. Cook pasta until just done. Drain and rinse with cold water.
3. Chop any combinations of vegetables. Add to the dressing along with onions.
4. If using meat, add it as well.
5. Mix all ingredients together.
6. Chill before serving on lettuce leaves.
